name: Betnovate / Diprovate
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Potent topical corticosteroid that binds glucocorticoid receptors and reduces pro-inflammatory mediators (prostaglandins, leukotrienes), inhibiting immune-inflammatory cascade in skin.
drug_interactions: Systemic interactions if large areas used under occlusion
contraindications: Skin infections (bacterial, fungal, viral) — do not apply
Do not use in children under 1 year
what_to_avoid: Do not use on face or genitals unless directed
Do not use for more than 2 weeks continuously
Do not cover with occlusive dressing unless directed
